name: Apollo.io Sales Intelligence
description: Company/person/domain lookup and active sequence reports via the Apollo.io API
context:
Apollo API key: stored at ~/.apollo-api-key (one-line file, chmod 600). All scripts read it from there.
Lookup: bash {{PROJECT_PATH}}/skills/apollo/apollo-lookup.sh company "Name" | person "Name" | domain "example.com"
Active sequences report: APOLLO_API_KEY=$(cat ~/.apollo-api-key) node {{PROJECT_PATH}}/skills/apollo/apollo-active-sequences-report.js [output_dir]
Default report output dir: ~/apollo-reports/ (override by passing a path as the first arg).
